{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-02-13.
13,171 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-12 -> 2026-02-13)

- "What toxin will five European governments say tissue samples conclusively found in Alexey Navalny's body, by February 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Novichok: 0.25, Polonium-210: 0.20, Dioxin: 0.10, Sarin: 0.10} | Truth: epibatidine
  Brier: -0.12 | TW-Score: -12.25
- "Which two cities will be linked by the high-speed rail section that authorities investigate for burned cables during the 2026 Winter Olympics, by February 14, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Madrid-Barcelona: 0.20, Berlin-Munich: 0.15, Paris-Lyon: 0.15, Rome-Naples: 0.10} | Truth: Rome and Naples
  Brier: -0.09 | TW-Score: -9.50

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 330 (155 resolved, 175 active)
- accuracy: 7.0% | brier skill score: 0.004 | time weighted score: -679.20
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
